ksa_text: Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required by data protection and AI regulations, including processing registrations, DPO appointments, and system registrations with supporting documentation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Regulatory Compliance falls outside the primary competency scope of the Director of Data Engineering. This task KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Regulatory Compliance truly out-of-scope for the Director of Data Engineering? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Regulatory Compliance as a core or recommended competency for the Director of Data Engineering. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Regulatory Compliance falls outside the established competency profile for the Director of Data Engineering. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Regulatory Compliance is outside the competency scope of the Director of Data Engineering. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
